title: German grid cannot survive ‘Dunkelflauten’ without new power plants, Uniper warns
summary_full: State-owned energy firm says gas power plants needed to backstop grid during periods of low sun and wind
summary_public: State-owned energy firm says gas power plants needed to backstop grid during periods of low sun and wind
